author: National Geographic YouTube
text:
Hammerhead Sharks Up Close with Bertie Gregory | Official Trailer | National Geographic
In Mexico’s Pacific waters, Bertie Gregory goes in search of one of the ocean’s most iconic predators: the hammerhead shark. Once abundant in these seas, hammerhead numbers have plummeted, making sightings increasingly rare. Bertie investigates what’s driving the hammerhead decline, and how protected waters offer hope for the future. His journey culminates in a rare and unforgettable encounter that shines a light on the future of one of the world’s most famous sharks.

author: National Geographic YouTube
text:
Ocean with David Attenborough (Full Documentary) | World Ocean Day Special | National Geographic
Celebrate World Ocean Day by watching this Ocean with David Attenborough full documentary special in stunning 4K. Attenborough, the world’s leading natural historian, draws on a lifetime of knowledge to reveal how Earth’s vast, interconnected waterways can be restored. This important documentary shines a light on both the beauty of the sea and the ways in which humans are depleting its riches. 

Ocean with David Attenborough | SPECIAL 

Chapters 📚
00:00 - Final Frontier
10:57 - Coastal Seas 
24:43 - Overfishing 
49:26 - Ocean Conservation 
01:13:15 - David Attenborough's Final Thoughts
